			"C_o":452.05,
			"a":1.7784e-07,
			"C_x":1e+06,
			"iter":2,
			"sei":0.232829,
			"ses":0.00716397,
			"r2":0.922119,
			"slope":0.17776,
			"domain":53,
			"n":54
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
